case_title: US BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION N.D. VS. THERESA A MULLEN et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF US BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION N.D. AS TO DEFENDANT MULLEN, THERESA A DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-10-2012
DECLARATION RE: VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF US BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION N.D.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF US BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION N.D. SERVED MAY-18-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MULLEN, THERESA A
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF US BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION N.D. AS TO DEFENDANT MULLEN, THERESA A
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $439.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT MULLEN, THERESA A
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
DECLARATION RE: UNAVAILABLE OF ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT; COMPUTATION OF INTEREST; NOTICE PURSUANT TO CCP 1033(B)(2) FILED BY PLAINTIFF US BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION N.D.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF US BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION N.D. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MULLEN, THERESA A $12,304.59 PRINCIPAL, $3,289.12 INTEREST, $439.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $16,033.21, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
